<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="core" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="35%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="25%" stop-color="#b9d6ff" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="70%" stop-color="#5aa6ff" stop-opacity="0.25"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000000" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="arm" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9fe2ff" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#7a8cff" stop-opacity="0.55"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4d7dff" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#05060b"/>

  <!-- stars (dots) -->
  <g fill="#d7e7ff" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="62" cy="86" r="1.6"/>
    <circle cx="92" cy="160" r="1.2"/>
    <circle cx="140" cy="70" r="1.1"/>

    <circle cx="205" cy="290" r="1.2"/>
    <circle cx="285" cy="300" r="1.1"/>
    <circle cx="350" cy="320" r="1.2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- galaxy core glow -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="135" fill="url(#core)"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="38" fill="#eaf3ff" opacity="0.95"/>

  <!-- spiral arms (stylized) -->
  <g fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="7" opacity="0.95">
    <!-- arm 1 -->
    <path d="M256,256
             C300,205 355,185 404,205
             C455,226 470,280 438,315
             C406,350 340,360 300,330
             C260,300 245,255 270,220
             C300,176 368,165 416,198
             C460,227 470,286 438,332" 
          stroke="url(#arm)"/>
    <!-- arm 2 -->
    <path d="M256,256
             C215,295 170,315 125,300
             C76,285 60,235 88,200
             C120,160 180,150 226,182
             C270,214 290,265 265,303
             C240,342 182,353 140,325
             C96,296 90,240 125,205" 
          stroke="#6aa9ff" stroke-opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- subtle outer tendrils -->
    <path d="M256,256
             C310,175 400,150 460,205
             C495,237 492,290 452,330
             C412,370 330,386 270,335"
          stroke="#a7dfff" stroke-opacity="0.25" stroke-width="4"/>
  </g>

  <!-- orbiting planet-ish orb -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="392" cy="150" r="12" fill="#8aa5ff" opacity="0.95"/>
    <circle cx="388" cy="146" r="3" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.85"/>
    <path d="M352 168 C 374 146 410 140 435 155" fill="none" stroke="#7fb4ff" stroke-opacity="0.35" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
